failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest item and price not present in the catalog search results: item 0000000000 at $0.01 instead of item 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The required information was available by index 3: the sorted search results show item 1240311797 priced at $137.17 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from the tool output and contradicts the available evidence. This fabricated value directly caused the incorrect final answer and was not resolved later.
